conversations.content: Create a new github repository named new_project, and invite all collaborators in emmajohnson/image_transformation as the collaborators.

<final_answer></final_answer>

<function_thought>
The OTP for verifying the account creation of the repository "new_project" has been retrieved from the email. The OTP is "598659". I will proceed to verify the account using this OTP to complete the repository creation process.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[verify_github_account(otp="598659")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>
Account verified. The repository of 'emmajohnson/new_project' successfully created.

<function_thought>
